original_image_tags: A single, aged page of thin paper, showing the reverse side of a typed document. The paper has two hole-punch marks at the top. The primary typed text on this side is extremely faint and appears as a mirror image, indicating it is bleed-through from the front side of the page. At the bottom, there are several dark blue ink stamps and some handwritten annotations.

elements.description: A single page showing faint, mirrored typed text bleeding through from the reverse side, along with two black hole-punch marks at the top and multiple blue ink stamps at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the visual content: faint mirrored bleed-through text, two hole-punch marks, and blue ink stamps at the bottom, with no conflicting claims about object counts or specific quoted text.
